zh.lifeSummary: 當Lleucu verch Gruffudd於大約1168年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，她的父親Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach39歲，母親Mabel FitzWilliam19歲。她於1196年與Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe在威爾士卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lleucu verch Gruffudd于大约1168年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，她的父亲Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach39岁，母亲Mabel FitzWilliam19岁。她于1196年与Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe在威尔士卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Lleucu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lleucu verch Gruffudd was born about 1168, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, was 39 and her mother, Mabel FitzWilliam, was 19. She married Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe in 1196, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lleucu verch Gruffudd est née environ 1168, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzWilliam, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe en 1196, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lleucu verch Gruffudd um 1168 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach 39 und ihre Mutter Mabel FitzWilliam 19. Sie hat 1196 in Carmarthenshire, Wales Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lleucu verch Gruffudd è nata il circa 1168 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Mabel FitzWilliam, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe nel 1196, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Lleucu verch Gruffuddが約1168年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Gruffudd ap Ifor Bachは39歳，母Mabel FitzWilliamは19歳であった。1196年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでLord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lleucu verch Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1168년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel FitzWilliam(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1196년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lleucu verch Gruffudd nasceu aproximadamente 1168, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Mabel FitzWilliam, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe em 1196, em Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lleucu verch Gruffudd родилась около 1168 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel FitzWilliam, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe в 1196 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lleucu verch Gruffudd nació aproximadamente 1168, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gruffudd ap Ifor Bach, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Mabel FitzWilliam, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Lord Seisyll ap Llewelyn - Lord of Cantrescliffe en 1196, en Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija.
